message.content:
Test file: src/claim-office.spec.ts
Implementation file: src/claim-office.ts
Failing test: "quote for 2 runes (newcomer) returns 60"
Current error: Expected 60, received 33 (only first item is counted)
Passing tests so far: 6

Per MHPCO: 2 runes → base premium 50 (25 × 2). For newcomer: 50 + 5 (first insurance) + 5 (fee) = 60.

The current `basePremiumFor` only looks at items[0]. Change it to sum BASE_PREMIUMS over all items.

This should keep all 6 previously passing tests green (single-item cases sum to themselves).

Run `pnpm test` to verify all 7 tests pass.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, return after completion.

content.text: I'll analyze the current implementation and make the minimal change to pass the failing test.

input.old_string:
const basePremiumFor = (items: { type: string }[]): number =>
  items.length === 0 ? 0 : BASE_PREMIUMS[items[0].type];
input.new_string:
const basePremiumFor = (items: { type: string }[]): number =>
  items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + BASE_PREMIUMS[item.type], 0);

content.content: The file /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-16_23-33-33_claim-office-example-mapping_v7-hybrid-green-refactor_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts has been updated successfully.

content.text:
Now let me verify the change works. The test for empty items expects premium 5 (just the processing fee). With the new reduce, empty items returns 0, then `quotePremium(0)` = `Math.ceil(0 + 0 + 5)` = 5. Good.

For the 2 runes test: base = 25 + 25 = 50. quotePremium(50) = Math.ceil(50 + 5 + 5) = 60. 

Let me run tests to verify.

content.content:

content.text:
All 7 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Changed `basePremiumFor` from indexing only `items[0]` to summing `BASE_PREMIUMS[item.type]` across all items via `reduce`.
- Result: All 7 tests pass (21 still todo).
- Approach: Minimal change — replaced single-item lookup with a sum. Empty array still yields 0 (preserves the empty test), single-item arrays sum to themselves (preserves the 5 single-item tests), and 2 runes now correctly yields base 50 → premium 60.

Relevant file:
- /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-16_23-33-33_claim-office-example-mapping_v7-hybrid-green-refactor_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts
